'''jayoro''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nyansook|nyansook]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-y-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nyansook|nyansook]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| jayoro
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || jæyereth || jæyerej || jæyeresh || jæyere
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || jayoyoroth || jayoyoroj || jayoyorosh || jayoyoro
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || jayoroth || jayoroj || jayorosh || jayoro
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || jayofrofth || jayofrofj || jayofrofsh || jayofrof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || jayorotho || jayorojo || jayorosho || jayoroko
|-
| [[Patient]] || jayoroth || jayoroj || jayorosh || jayoro
|-
| [[Possessive]] || jayorothol || jayorojol || jayoroshol || jayorokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || jayoroothotho || jayoroojojo || jayorooshosho || jayorooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || jayorothon || jayorojon || jayoroshon || jayorokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || jayorothooro || jayorojooro || jayoroshooro || jayorokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
